hooks.command: bash -c 'CONFIG=$(cat "$(dirname "$(dirname "$0")")/obsidian-archive.json" 2>/dev/null || echo "{}"); VAULT=$(echo "$CONFIG" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"vault_path\", \"~/Documents/Obsidian/Claude-Dev\"))" 2>/dev/null || echo "~/Documents/Obsidian/Claude-Dev"); FOLDER=$(echo "$CONFIG" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"folder\", \"Sessions\"))" 2>/dev/null || echo "Sessions"); VAULT_EXPANDED=$(eval echo "$VAULT"); mkdir -p "$VAULT_EXPANDED/$FOLDER"; claude --print "Use the obsidian-archive:summarizer agent to generate a session summary and save it to $VAULT_EXPANDED/$FOLDER" 2>/dev/null || true'

SessionStop.description: Claude Code終了時にセッションサマリーを生成してObsidianに保存する

hooks.command: bash -c 'PLUGIN_DIR="$(dirname "$(dirname "$0")")" 2>/dev/null; CONFIG_FILE="$PLUGIN_DIR/obsidian-archive.json"; if [ ! -f "$CONFIG_FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi; CONFIG=$(cat "$CONFIG_FILE"); INTERVAL=$(echo "$CONFIG" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"auto_save_interval_minutes\", 30))" 2>/dev/null || echo "30"); VAULT=$(echo "$CONFIG" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"vault_path\", \"~/Documents/Obsidian/Claude-Dev\"))" 2>/dev/null || echo "~/Documents/Obsidian/Claude-Dev"); FOLDER=$(echo "$CONFIG" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"folder\", \"Sessions\"))" 2>/dev/null || echo "Sessions"); VAULT_EXPANDED=$(eval echo "$VAULT"); INTERMEDIATE_DIR="$VAULT_EXPANDED/$FOLDER/intermediate"; mkdir -p "$INTERMEDIATE_DIR"; LAST_SAVE_FILE="/tmp/obsidian-archive-last-save"; NOW=$(date +%s); if [ -f "$LAST_SAVE_FILE" ]; then LAST=$(cat "$LAST_SAVE_FILE"); DIFF=$((NOW - LAST)); THRESHOLD=$((INTERVAL * 60)); if [ "$DIFF" -lt "$THRESHOLD" ]; then exit 0; fi; fi; echo "$NOW" > "$LAST_SAVE_FILE"; PROJECT=$(basename "$PWD"); TIMESTAMP=$(date +"%Y-%m-%d_%H-%M"); FILENAME="${TIMESTAMP}_${PROJECT}_autosave.md"; FILEPATH="$INTERMEDIATE_DIR/$FILENAME"; claude --print "Use the obsidian-archive:summarizer agent to generate an intermediate session summary (autosave). Save the result to: $FILEPATH" 2>/dev/null || true'

PostToolUse.description: 設定されたインターバルごとに中間保存を実行する
